title: Sugarflair White Edible Glitter Dust Spray (Non-Aerosol) - Add a Shimmering Lustre Sparkle to Cakes, Cupcakes, Chocolate, Baking, Desserts, Ice Cream, Drinks, Cocktails and more - 10g
features: Edible Glitter For A Sparkling Finish - With the Sugarflair Powder Pump Spray Dust range, you can easily add a touch of sparkle and shine to your edible creations. These versatile glitter sprays are perfect for adding an eye-catching finish to your cake decorations, making them perfect for special occasions like weddings, birthdays, and anniversaries.

Non-Aerosol Edible Glitter Spray - Comes in a handy push pump bottle for better accuracy when adding glitter dust to your creations: The Powder Pump Dusts come in a handy push pump bottle that allows for better accuracy when adding glitter dust to your decorations. This ensures that you can easily and precisely apply the glitter dust to your edible creations, resulting in a clean and professional finish.

Easy To Use Edible Paint - Easier to use than brushing, the pump provides a shimmering rain of coloured lustre dusts. Mix with a little dipping solution to create a shimmer paint or add to isomalt for some extra sparkle.
Easy to use - Simply aim the Powder Pump Dust at your decoration and press down on the pump to release the dust: The Sugarflair Powder Pump Spray Dusts are incredibly easy to use.

Give Your Cakes a Professional Touch - Can be used to draw attention to specific areas of your design, making it perfect for creating sugar flower bouquets, models, and other cake decorations: The Powder Pump Spray Dusts are great for artists creating sugar flower bouquets, as it will draw focus to particular parts of your cake. These versatile sprays allow you to add a professional and high-quality finish to all your cake decorations.

Versatile Glitter Spray - Available in an extensive range of bright and vibrant colours that will make your creations stand out: The Sugarflair Powder Pump Spray Dusts come in a range of vibrant and bold colours, ensuring that your decorations will stand out and make a lasting impression on your guests. Whether you're looking to create a soft pastel finish or a bold and bright statement, the Sugarflair range has a colour to suit your needs.
Nut Free, Gluten Free, GM Free, Kosher. Suitable for Vegetarians and Vegans
description: Product description Looking to add a touch of sparkle and shine to your cake decorations? Look no further than the Sugarflair Powder Pump Spray Dust range! These versatile and vibrant glitter sprays are the perfect addition to any cake decorator's toolkit, allowing you to add a gorgeous lustre shine and sparkling finish to your edible creations. Whether you're creating sugar flower bouquets, models, or other cake decorations, the Sugarflair Powder Pump Spray Dusts are a fantastic way to draw attention to specific areas of your design. These glitter sprays come in a range of bright and bold colours, ensuring that your decorations will stand out and make a lasting impression on your guests. One of the best things about the Sugarflair Powder Pump Spray Dusts is their ease of use. The handy push pump bottle allows for better accuracy when adding glitter dust to your creations, while the 100% edible formula means that these sprays can be used safely on all decorating mediums including sugarpaste/fondant, modelling paste, and flower paste. To use, simply aim the Powder Pump Dust at your decoration and press down on the pump to release the dust. Then use a dusting brush to neaten anything up if needed. The dusts can also be added to clear piping gel to give it colour and sparkle, allowing you to create glitter borders and decorations, or mixed with rejuvenator spirit or dipping solution to form glitter paint for hand-painted decorations and messages. But the Sugarflair Powder Pump Spray Dusts aren't just for cake decorators! These versatile aerosol free sprays can also be used to add colour and glitter to a range of other edible creations. Add a touch of sparkle to cupcakes, cookies, or even cocktails - the possibilities are endless! Ingredients Colour Carrier: E555 Potassium Aluminium Silicate, Colour: E171 Titanium Dioxide Directions Use a spray while holding it about 10-20cm away from the dough and spray gently. Manufacturer Contact Information Sugarflair Colours Ltd. 2a Armstrong Road, Manor Trading Estate, Benfleet, Essex, SS7 4PW. See more
